original_text:
### Accessibility (brand-mandated)
- Body copy **≥16px**; bigger is better.
- Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
- Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
- Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
- Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.
- Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
- Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.
- Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).

relations.note: The email-specific GIF requirements refine the general motion guidance.

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.

rules.intent: Ensure readable text and clear hierarchy for accessible comprehension.
rules.rule_text: Body copy must be at least 16px, with larger sizes preferred; line height must be at least 150%, with more leading for light-on-dark text. Use a type scale to establish visual hierarchy.

quotes: Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.

rules.intent: Prevent color-dependent communication and illegible text.
rules.rule_text: Test contrast, never rely on color alone, and proof all text for legibility; use WCAG (wcag.com) as the reference standard.

quotes: Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Keep form controls identifiable and operable.
rules.rule_text: Forms must keep labels always visible: do not use placeholder-as-label or disappearing labels. Click and tap targets must meet the 48px minimum.

quotes: Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.

rules.intent: Reduce motion burden while maintaining usable responsive experiences.
rules.rule_text: Animations should use quick transitions that do not interrupt flow, avoid excessive motion, provide a way to pause effects, and be designed for phone, tablet, and desktop.

quotes: no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback
**[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Ensure essential email content remains available where animation is limited or unsuitable.
rules.rule_text: In general email, animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 because Outlook shows only the first frame. Autoplaying motion longer than approximately 5 seconds requires a static fallback.

quotes: Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Provide equivalent access to visual and time-based media content.
rules.rule_text: All images must have descriptive alt text, and transcripts must be available for any video or audio.
